TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-map_buya

S.TRANSL: Buay came out from his house.
(he) came out and then turned left.

S.FORM: mlazyu ti tu sazan s% tu sazan ‘nay.

S.TRANSL: then (he walked) towards the mountain and climbed.
then he saw…he saw that pig…

S.FORM: n usiq babuy ta(04) babuy na naung.
nani mlazyu uman wi smaRuR ti ya.
S.TRANSL: 他又經過了(山豬)後，再走下去。
(He) passed (the boar) again and then went down (the mountain).
and arrived at the big place…road.

S.FORM: nani takawilian zana lepaw ni utay.
S.TRANSL: Utay’s home was on the left (of the road).

S.FORM: tmeqez talepawan ni utay tu salukian.
S.TRANSL: (He) stopped over at Utay’s house for one hour.

S.FORM: nani pun ti tautayan man za ‘nay(06)AX.
pun ti nani zukat ti wiya ti uman seme% smaqay.
S.TRANSL: (he) went out and then walking again

S.FORM: wi(04) smaqay nani titaanna pasa kawanan yau usiq kitut ay lazan.
S.TRANSL: 他看到右邊有一條小路；
He saw on the right there was one road that was small;
之後他就往那個(小路的方向)走。

S.FORM: kawa kawanan na lazan ‘nay yau usiq ‘nay iki.
S.TRANSL: There was one pond on the right of the road.

S.FORM: qatuRiyas uman ci buya smaqay tu lazanna.
S.TRANSL: Buya again walked (along) his way very fast.

S.FORM: ah nani mlazyu uman tu sazan.

S.TRANSL: and then went to the front.

S.FORM: yau ti ‘nay(07) Raya ay tabay ay zena tayan nani.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有一塊又大又寬的水田。
There was a paddy field that was big and wide over there.
(He) went along the middle of the paddy field.

S.FORM: maseq ta zen ta zen ta.
mlazyu tu Raya ay ‘nay lazan nani.
S.TRANSL: and crossed the road that was big.

S.FORM: mlazyu lazan ‘nay yau muaza paRin tayan nani.
S.TRANSL: 過了大馬路，那裡有很多樹。
(He) crossed that road and there were a lot of trees there.
